prompt: Implement `findMedianSortedArrays(nums1: number[], nums2: number[]): number` that finds the median of two sorted arrays. Must run in O(log(m+n)) time.
canonicalSolution: export function findMedianSortedArrays(nums1: number[], nums2: number[]): number { if (nums1.length > nums2.length) return findMedianSortedArrays(nums2, nums1); const m = nums1.length, n = nums2.length; let lo = 0, hi = m; while (lo <= hi) { const i = (lo + hi) >> 1; const j = ((m + n + 1) >> 1) - i; const l1 = i > 0 ? nums1[i-1]! : -Infinity; const r1 = i < m ? nums1[i]! : Infinity; const l2 = j > 0 ? nums2[j-1]! : -Infinity; const r2 = j < n ? nums2[j]! : Infinity; if (l1 <= r2 && l2 <= r1) { const lMax = Math.max(l1, l2); const rMin = Math.min(r1, r2); return (m + n) % 2 === 0 ? (lMax + rMin) / 2 : lMax; } if (l1 > r2) hi = i - 1; else lo = i + 1; } throw new Error('invalid'); }
